mapper.update:
update cm_customer set if_gift_score = '1' where user_id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select cc.user_id, cc.create_time, cc.phone, cc.avatar, cc.nickname, cc.name, cc.birthday, cc.hobby, cc.major, cc.brief, cc.invitation_code, cc.verified, cc.merchant_id, cm.merchant_name, concat(c1.city_name,c2.city_name,c3.city_name,cm.address) as fullAddress from cm_customer cc left join cm_merchant_info cm on cc.merchant_id = cm.id left join city_code c1 on cm.province_code = c1.city_id left join city_code c2 on cm.city_code = c2.city_id left join city_code c3 on cm.country_code = c3.city_id where cc.user_id = #{userId}

select cc.user_id, cc.create_time, cc.phone, cc.avatar, cc.username, cc.nickname, cc.name, cc.gender, cc.age, cc.birthday, cc.hobby, cc.major, cc.brief, cc.role_id, cc.merchant_id, cc.user_score, cc.if_gift_score, cc.invitation_code, cc.inviter_id, cc.verified, cmi.merchant_name from cm_customer cc left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cc.merchant_id = cmi.id where cc.user_id = #{userId}

select cc.user_id, cc.create_time, cc.phone, cc.avatar, cc.username, cc.nickname, cc.name, cc.gender, cc.age, cc.birthday, cc.hobby, cc.major, cc.brief, cc.role_id, cc.merchant_id, cc.user_score, cc.if_gift_score, cc.invitation_code, cc.inviter_id, cc.verified, cmi.merchant_name from cm_customer cc left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cc.merchant_id = cmi.id where cc.phone = #{phone}
mapper.update: update cm_customer set user_score = #{userScore} where user_id = #{userId}
